behavior_in_task_description.reason: instruction.md names all relevant files (encoder_cudagraph.py, encoder_cudagraph_defs.py, gpu_model_runner.py, qwen3_vl.py, interfaces.py, test_encoder_cudagraph.py) and the stale/correct module paths that tests assert on.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes the problem (stale import path) and says 'modules live elsewhere under vllm/v1/worker/' but doesn't specify exact line changes; agent must still find each import and fix it.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests check for absence of stale prefix and presence of correct module paths via AST — any correct fix using the canonical path passes; count thresholds (>=3 in qwen3_vl, >=1 elsewhere) match the actual required import sites.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests use ast.parse to inspect imports and run subprocess tools (ruff, typos, py_compile, SPDX, forbidden-imports checks) — not pure string matching.

test_not_tautological.reason: Each f2p test requires both removing stale imports and adding correct ones; a stub couldn't satisfy both conditions.

behavior_in_tests.reason: All behavior described (fixing imports across listed files) is covered by the import-path and no-stale-path tests.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped with section comments 'Fail-to-pass' and 'Pass-to-pass' and have descriptive names/docstrings.

no_typos.reason: File paths and module names in instruction.md match the repo.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction lists files to look at but doesn't name exact line numbers; localization across each file still required.
